home.howItWorksDesc: [IT] Trading Tazos Game is a physics-based tazo battle game where you collect, trade, and battle with unique disc creatures. Each tazo has 9 combat stats — slam them into the arena, flip your opponent's discs, and capture them to win.
home.physicsDesc: [IT] Real physics engine powers every battle. Weight, spin, bounce, and momentum affect how your tazos behave in the 3D arena. Master the Vertical Slam system: Aim → Charge → Tilt to dominate the competition.
home.playAnywhereDesc: [IT] Download the TTG-Engine for desktop, play in your browser, or install as a PWA on mobile. Your collection syncs across all your devices.

howToPlay.title: [IT] Start Your Journey
howToPlay.subtitle: [IT] From downloading the launcher to dominating the arena — here's everything you need to begin.
howToPlay.step1Desc: [IT] The TTG-Engine is the game launcher. It gives you the full experience: 3D arena battles, PvP matchmaking, offline collection viewer, and automatic updates.
howToPlay.step1Browser: [IT] Play instantly at tradingtazosgame.com — no install needed
howToPlay.step1Mobile: [IT] Coming soon to Google Play and the App Store
howToPlay.step1Engine: [IT] One launcher, everything in one place.
howToPlay.step2Desc: [IT] Launch the TTG-Engine (or open the site) and create your account — takes under a minute.
howToPlay.step2PickUsername: [IT] Pick a username — your identity in the arena
howToPlay.step2EnterEmail: [IT] Enter your email — for account recovery and battle notifications
howToPlay.step2SetPassword: [IT] Set a password — keep your collection safe
howToPlay.step2Welcome: [IT] You'll instantly receive 30 welcome bags + 100 CREDITS. No credit card, no hidden costs — the game is completely free to play.
howToPlay.step3Desc: [IT] Your 30 welcome bags are waiting in the Shop. Each one contains a random tazo:
howToPlay.step3Standard: [IT] Standard Bags — Common and uncommon tazos (most of your starter collection)
howToPlay.step3Premium: [IT] Premium Bags — Better odds for rare tazos
howToPlay.step3Mega: [IT] Mega Bags — Highest chance for ultra rare and legendary tazos
howToPlay.step3OpenAll: [IT] Open them all — this is your first squad. Buy more bags with CREDITS earned from winning battles and completing quests.
howToPlay.step4Desc: [IT] Choose 20 tazos to form your battle deck. Each tazo has 9 combat stats that determine how it performs in the arena:
howToPlay.step4Balance: [IT] Balance heavy hitters with defensive walls. A smart deck beats a strong one.
howToPlay.step5Desc: [IT] The Vertical Slam combat system has 3 phases per turn:
howToPlay.step5Aim: [IT] Aim — Lock your crosshair on the target zone where you want your tazo to land
howToPlay.step5Charge: [IT] Charge — Time the power bar for maximum slam force
howToPlay.step5Tilt: [IT] Tilt — Angle your throw for precise landing control
howToPlay.step5Slam: [IT] Your tazo drops from above, slamming into the arena. A direct hit can flip opponent tazos — capturing them for your side. Each miss costs you your thrown tazo. Eliminate their entire deck to win!
howToPlay.step6Quests: [IT] 17 quests across 4 categories — Beginner, Daily, Weekly, Special
howToPlay.step6Credits: [IT] Earn CREDITS to buy more bags and expand your collection
howToPlay.step6Leaderboard: [IT] Climb the leaderboard — prove you're the ultimate collector
howToPlay.step6Finale: [IT] Every battle, every quest, every opened bag pushes you further up the ranks.
howToPlay.ctaDescription: [IT] Head to the Download page to get the TTG-Engine, or start right here in your browser.

download.title: [IT] Download & Play
download.browserDesc: [IT] Create a free account, open your starter bags, build a deck, and jump into the 3D arena — all from your browser.
download.pwaDesc: [IT] Open in Safari/Chrome → tap Share → Add to Home Screen → play fullscreen like a native app!
download.googlePlayDesc: [IT] Android app with offline collection viewer, push battle notifications, and exclusive mobile-only tazo drops.
download.appStoreDesc: [IT] Native iOS experience with haptic feedback, iCloud sync for your collection, Game Center leaderboards, and AR tazo viewer.
download.desktopEngineDesc: [IT] The full-featured desktop launcher. 3D arena battles at 144+ FPS, PvP matchmaking, offline collection viewer, automatic updates. Direct install — no store required.
download.electronDesc: [IT] Cross-platform desktop app with Discord Rich Presence, system tray integration, and native notifications.

faq.title: [IT] Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: [IT] Trading Tazos Game is a physics-based disc battle game where you collect, trade, and battle with unique tazos. Each tazo has 9 combat stats and unique abilities. The game is completely free to play.
faq.a2: [IT] Download the TTG-Engine for your platform (Windows, macOS, or Linux) from the Download page, or play directly in your browser. Create a free account and you'll receive 30 welcome bags to start your collection.
faq.a3: [IT] There are 351 tazo entities planned across 3 series in Season 1: Minimon (151), Dracobell (72), and Cybermon (128). New tazos are added regularly.
faq.a4: [IT] Yes! Trading Tazos Game is completely free to play. You earn CREDITS by winning battles and completing quests, which you can use to buy more bags. No real money required.
faq.a5: [IT] Attack, Defense, Resistance, Weight, Stability, Spin, Control, Bounce, and Precision. Each stat affects how your tazo performs in the 3D arena — from impact power to wall rebounds.
faq.a6: [IT] Yes! The TTG-Engine supports PvP matchmaking. You can challenge friends or queue for ranked matches. WebSocket-based multiplayer runs on the TTG servers.
faq.q7: [IT] How does the battle system work?
faq.a7: [IT] Each turn uses the Vertical Slam system: Aim your crosshair, Charge the power bar, and Tilt for landing angle. Your tazo drops from above — hit the opponent's discs hard enough to flip and capture them.
faq.q8: [IT] How many tazos in a deck?
faq.a8: [IT] Each battle deck holds exactly 20 tazos. Build a balanced deck mixing high-attack hitters with defensive walls for the best results.

collections.title: [IT] Collections
collections.subtitle: [IT] 3 original series · 351 Season 1 tazos · lore-safe TTG canon

minimon.name: [IT] Minimon
minimon.desc: [IT] Minimon awaken when Life Sparks settle into natural forms across Luminara. Pathfinders don't capture them — they form Bond Marks, travel together, and help each lineage unlock its next Bloom.

dracobell.name: [IT] Dracobell
dracobell.desc: [IT] Dracobell warriors train in Bellora, where combat is rhythm, breath, discipline, and will. Their Roar Aura fuels Ascensions as Bell Shards reshape the fate of the clans.

cybermon.name: [IT] Cybermon
cybermon.desc: [IT] Cybermon are living digital creatures with Soul Protocols, born from memory, signals, lost files, and errors that learned to breathe inside the Neon Grid. Linkers synchronize with them through the Link Pulse.

leaderboard.title: [IT] Leaderboard
leaderboard.noPlayers: [IT] No players yet — be the first!

footer.aboutDesc: [IT] Collect, trade, and battle with unique tazo discs in a physics-based 3D arena. Completely free to play.
footer.copyright: [IT] © 2026 Trading Tazos Game. All rights reserved.
footer.madeWith: [IT] Made with ♥ for tazo fans worldwide.

notFound.title: [IT] 404 — Page Not Found
notFound.description: [IT] The page you're looking for doesn't exist. Return home to explore the wiki and discover all 351 tazos.
notFound.heading: [IT] This page was flipped out of the arena!
notFound.subtitle: [IT] Even legendary tazos miss sometimes.
